---
id: get-matched-device-capabilities
title: "查询设备匹配能力"
description: "查询单个设备中符合过滤条件的能力配置，只返回命中的定义与对应 trait 当前值，不返回设备全量定义。"
sidebar_label: "查询设备匹配能力"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询设备匹配能力"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/capabilities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询单个设备中符合过滤条件的能力配置，只返回命中的定义与对应 trait 当前值，不返回设备全量定义。

:::tip   
- `functionCodes`、`traitCodes`、`commandCodes` 之间按 AND 关系组合；如需查询 trait 或 command 任一类能力，请分开请求，或按 `functionCodes` 查询完整 function 定义。
- 只传 `functionCodes`，不传 `traitCodes` 或 `commandCodes` 时：返回该 Function 下所有完整的 Trait 和 Command 定义（即全部叶子节点）。
- 传入 traitCodes 或 commandCodes 时：只返回匹配这些条件的 Trait 或 Command 叶子，未匹配的叶子不返回。command 没有当前值。
- 设备存在但能力未命中时，返回设备基础信息且 `endpoints=[]`；设备不存在或不可访问时，`data=null`。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"deviceId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"设备 ID。","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"deviceTypesList","in":"query","required":false,"description":"设备类型列表。用于先校验设备整体类型，再裁剪匹配 endpoint 类型。\n\n:::tip\n`deviceTypesList` 不能单独作为能力过滤条件。\n:::\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"deviceTypesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"`deviceTypesList` 内多个设备类型的匹配方式。\n`or`：设备命中任意一个类型。\n`and`：设备必须同时命中全部类型。\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"functionCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"functionCode 列表。\n与 `traitCodes`、`commandCodes` 至少传一个。\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"functionCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"`functionCodes` 内多个值的匹配方式。\n`or`：命中任意一个。\n`and`：裁剪后的结果必须包含全部值。\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"traitCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"traitCode 列表\n与 `functionCodes`、`commandCodes` 至少传一个。\ntrait 命中时返回定义、当前值 value 与更新时间 time\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"traitCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"traitCodes 内多个值的匹配方式。\n`and` 表示必须在同一个 function 内同时命中全部 trait。\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"commandCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"commandCode 列表。\n与 `traitCodes`、`functionCodes` 至少传一个。\ncommand 只返回命令定义和字段定义，没有当前值。\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"commandCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"commandCodes 内多个值的匹配方式。\n`and`：必须在同一个 function 内同时命中全部 command。\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"接口请求成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"gatewayId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"此设备所绑定的网关 ID。\n如果 `gatewayId` 等于 `deviceId`，表示这个设备自身是网关。\n如果 `gatewayId` 为 `null` 或空字符串，表示这个设备是不带子设备的直连网关或第三方接入设备。\n"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","description":"端点列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointId","endpointName","deviceType","functions"],"properties":{"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点ID"},"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"端点名称"},"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"设备类型"},"functions":{"type":"array","description":"功能列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["functionCode"],"properties":{"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码（如 LevelControl, ColorControl, Output）"},"traits":{"type":"array","description":"功能点列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["traitCode","parameter"],"properties":{"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能点代码（如 CurrentLevel, ColorTemperature, OnOff）"},"parameter":{"description":"功能点属性","allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"数据类型。<br />\n<table>\n  <thead>\n    <tr>\n      <th>名称</th>\n      <th>类型</th>\n      <th>说明</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Bool</td>\n      <td>布尔型</td>\n      <td>真或假（true/false）。</td>\n    </tr>\n Integer、Float、String、Struct、Enum。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Data</td>\n      <td>数据块</td>\n      <td>16 进制字符串（Hex String），如 \"0x01AB3F\"。</td>\n    </tr>\n parameter.type 为 Enum 时，此字段有意义。","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"键值对","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"键"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"值"}},"title":"KeyValue"},"nullable":true},"unit":{"description":"单位。仅当 parameter.type 为 Integer 或 Float 时，此字段有意义。","type":"string","nullable":true},"step":{"description":"步长。仅当 parameter.type 为 Integer 或 Float parameter.type 的值保持一致。","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"值更新时间（毫秒级
